ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "learning_outcomes" TEXT /* Learning outcomes of the course */,
  "exam_form" TEXT /* Exam form for the course */,
  "literature" TEXT /* Literature used in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree offered by the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_director" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the course is being offered in */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period the course is being offered in */,
  "timetable_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timetable module for the course */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the course is taught in */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the course is being offered */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Meeting time of the course */,
  "meeting_place" TEXT /* Meeting place of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_timetable_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("timetable_module_id") REFERENCES timetable_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "exam_period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exam period */,
  "exam_period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exam period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timetable_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timetable module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the timetable module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the timetable module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "office_place" TEXT /* Office place of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the student's program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was given */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_faculty_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_member_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES course_assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
